data-engineer.description: Downloads and processes weather data from ERA5/CDS, GFS/NOMADS, CHIRPS/UCSB, and Himawari-9/AWS. Best for data pipeline work.

storm-cell-analyst.description: Processes Himawari-9 satellite imagery for convective storm detection and tracking. Best for satellite meteorology and image processing.

viz-builder.description: Builds and maintains the Leaflet.js interactive weather visualization dashboard (viz.py). Best for frontend map work.
